issues.title: SQL Injection
issues.description: User input is directly interpolated into SQL queries, making the application vulnerable to SQL injection attacks.

issues.title: Missing Input Validation
issues.description: The register function does not validate user inputs, which can lead to various security and logic issues.

issues.title: Plain Text Passwords
issues.description: Passwords are stored in plain text, which is a severe security risk.

issues.title: Empty Catch Block
issues.description: The catch block in the register function swallows errors, making it hard to debug issues.
issues.fix: Log the error and rethrow it

issues.title: SQL Injection
issues.description: User input is directly interpolated into SQL queries, making the application vulnerable to SQL injection attacks.

issues.title: Non-Expiring Tokens
issues.description: JWT tokens are created without an expiration time, which can lead to long-term security risks.
issues.fix: Set an expiration time for tokens

issues.title: Information Disclosure
issues.description: The login function reveals whether an email exists, which can aid attackers in enumeration attacks.

issues.title: Missing Authentication
issues.description: The getUser function does not check if the user is authenticated, allowing anyone to access user data.

issues.title: SQL Injection
issues.description: User input from URL parameters is directly interpolated into SQL queries, making the application vulnerable to SQL injection attacks.

issues.title: Sensitive Data Exposure
issues.description: The getUser function exposes sensitive fields like password, ssn, and credit_card in the response.
issues.fix: Omit sensitive fields from the response

issues.title: Dead Code
issues.description: The validateEmail and isAdmin functions are not used anywhere in the codebase.

issues.title: Hardcoded Credentials
issues.description: Database credentials are hardcoded in the source code, which is a security risk.

issues.title: Excessive Connections
issues.description: The connection limit is set to 100, which is too high and can lead to resource exhaustion.

issues.title: Unlimited Queue
issues.description: The queue limit is set to 0, which can cause memory issues and lead to a denial of service.

issues.title: Lack of Query Sanitization
issues.description: The execute function does not sanitize queries, making the application vulnerable to SQL injection attacks.

issues.type: Error logged but not properly thrown
issues.title: Incomplete Error Handling
issues.description: The execute function logs errors but does not rethrow them, making it hard to handle errors properly.

issues.title: Resource Leak
issues.description: The execute function does not release the database connection in the normal path, leading to resource leaks.
issues.fix: Release the connection in the normal path

issues.title: Dead Code
issues.description: The runMigrations function is not used anywhere in the codebase.

issues.title: Code Duplication
issues.description: The executeRaw function is a duplicate of execute with slight modifications.
issues.fix: Refactor to use a single function

issues.title: Resource Leak
issues.description: The executeRaw function does not release the database connection, leading to resource leaks.

issues.title: Missing Rate Limiting
issues.description: The server does not have rate limiting, which can lead to abuse and denial of service attacks.

issues.title: Missing CORS Configuration
issues.description: The server does not have CORS configuration, which can lead to cross-origin resource sharing issues.

issues.title: Missing Security Headers
issues.description: The server does not use helmet to set security headers, which can make it vulnerable to various attacks.

issues.title: Hardcoded Secrets
issues.description: The JWT_SECRET and DB_PASSWORD are hardcoded in the source code, which is a security risk.

issues.title: Memory Leak
issues.description: The setInterval function does not clear the interval, leading to memory leaks.
issues.fix: Clear the interval when no longer needed

issues.title: Weak Password Hashing
issues.description: The hashPassword function uses MD5, which is extremely weak and can be easily cracked.
issues.fix: Use a strong hashing algorithm like bcrypt

issues.title: Remote Code Execution
issues.description: The parseUserConfig function uses eval, which can lead to remote code execution attacks.
issues.fix: Use a safe JSON parsing method

issues.title: Weak Token Generation
issues.description: The generateResetToken function uses Math.random, which is not secure for token generation.
issues.fix: Use a cryptographically secure method for token generation

issues.title: Missing Brute Force Protection
issues.description: The verifyPassword function does not have brute force protection, which can lead to password guessing attacks.
issues.fix: Implement rate limiting and account lockout

issues.type: Blocking I/O in a request handler
issues.title: Blocking I/O
issues.description: The loadUserPermissions function uses synchronous file reading, which can block the event loop and degrade performance.

issues.title: Dead Code
issues.description: The legacyTokenVerification function is not used anywhere in the codebase.

issues.title: Missing Authentication
issues.description: The processPayment function does not check if the user is authenticated, allowing anyone to process payments.

issues.title: Missing Input Validation
issues.description: The processPayment function does not validate user inputs, which can lead to various security and logic issues.

agentSteps.description: Fetched repository tree from GitHub and identified 7 key code files.
Extracted and mapped code patterns. Evaluated 77 structural functions.
Ran rigorous OpenRouter analysis sequence. Detected 33 concrete issues.
Classified issues by severity and priority (Security/Perf/Bugs). Orchestration complete.
